# PipeSDK Placeholder

Place the official Douyin Live Companion interactive plugin PipeSDK files here.

This repository does not vendor the official SDK, demo, DLL, or Live Companion debug package. Download `pure_PipeSDK.zip` or `PipeSDK_FFmpeg.zip` and the official C++ demo from the Douyin Open Platform guide, then use a layout like:

```text
third_party/PipeSDK/
  include/
    PipeSDK.h
  lib/
    PipeSDK.lib
  bin/
    PipeSDK.dll
  demo/
```

This repository does not vendor the official SDK and does not contain private protocol or packet-capture logic.
